results.rendered_html: anirdaśa (3. a + nirdaśa [nis + daśan]) adj. f. ā aus den zehn Tagen (nach einer Geburt oder einem Sterbefall) noch nicht heraus: vigataṃ (gestorben) tu videśasthaṃ śṛṇuyādyo hyanirdaśam  M. 5,75 . anirdaśāyā goḥ 8 . anirdaśaṃ ca pretānnam 4,217 . 212 . tāvatsyādaśucirvipro yāvattatsyādanirdaśam 5,79 .

results.rendered_html: anirdaśa, anirdaśāha a. [na nirgatāni daśāhāni yasya] Within the 10 days of impurity caused either by childbirth or death; vigataṃ tu videśasthaṃ śṛṇuyādyo hyanirdaśaṃ  Ms. 5. 75 ; anirdaśāyā goḥ kṣīraṃ 5. 8 ; 5. 79 ; 4. 212 , 217 ; not ten days old; anirdaśāhāṃ gāṃ sūtāṃ  Ms. 8. 242.
